reasoning: The NIST 800-53 AU-10(1) control focuses on non-repudiation and the association of identities with actions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to audit logging and the configuration of authentication and authorization mechanisms. Audit logging ensures that actions are recorded and can be traced back to an identity, while proper authentication and authorization settings ensure that identities are correctly associated with their actions.
